Nickname: MAO Installer (dev CLI — not a patcher)
OneLineDescription: Standalone dev tooling; the Synthesis patcher is MAO.Synthesis.
LongDescription: Not a Synthesis patcher. This is the standalone CLI used for development (stats/tree/tree-effects/perk/write-tiers/write-patch). The Synthesis patcher users should install is MAO.Synthesis. Excluded from the patcher browser so it cannot be added by mistake.
